CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerEnterEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
local TriggerBodyEntity = event.TriggerBodyEntity local itemRUID = TriggerBodyEntity.SpriteRendererComponent.SpriteRUID
if itemRUID == "c30ea0b0b2384a69b9695c5344947a70" then _ItemService:CreateItem(Weapon, "나뭇가지", self.Entity.InventoryComponent) elseif itemRUID == "4d18ebe3ec764bd38e376b6802c3df66" then _ItemService:CreateItem(Weapon, "빛나는물약", self.Entity.InventoryComponent) end
TriggerBodyEntity:Destroy(0)

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleEntityDestroyEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code:
local Entity = event.Entity
if isvalid(Entity.UIItemSlot) then local itemName = Entity.UIItemSlot.item.Name if itemName == "빛나는물약" then self.Entity.PlayerComponent.Hp = self.Entity.PlayerComponent.Hp + 10 elseif itemName == "나뭇가지" then self:equip() end end
